Comfortable Accommodations: Pousada Vina in Jericoacoara offers family rooms with air-conditioning, balconies, and private bathrooms. Each room includes a minibar, free toiletries, and a shower.
Relaxing Facilities: Guests can enjoy spa facilities, a year-round outdoor swimming pool, and a lush garden. Free WiFi is available throughout the property.
Dining Experience: A buffet breakfast is served daily, featuring warm dishes, juice, cheese, and fruits. The inn also offers an indoor play area and outdoor seating areas.
Convenient Location: Located 29 km from Ariston Pessoa Regional Airport, Pousada Vina is a short walk from Jericoacoara Beach and close to attractions such as Dune Por do Sol and Nossa Senhora de Fatima Chapel.
